dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Level thesis identifies bearish asymmetry with strong 2★ resistance at 684.92 only $2.34 above price while weak 1★ support cluster (682/681/680) offers minimal downside defense; technical agent sees CHOP with mixed ribbon (29¢ spread below 30¢ threshold) and price 39¢ below pivot equilibrium.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Bullish agents interpret VIX compression and sector rotation as a directional entry signal, but fail to reconcile this with the actual morning price structure: mixed ribbon (chop), below-pivot position, flat overnight gap, and a 2★ resistance level at 684.92 with no structural support until Carry at 675.79 ($6.79 away).
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY tests 684.92 on first rally and REJECTS (closes below 684.00 on the test), confirming the bearish level asymmetry and triggering a flush through the weak 1★ support cluster toward Carry 675.79.

primary.condition: if SPY tests 684.92 and ribbon aligns bullish (spread ≥30¢, bull stack) on the hold

secondary.condition: if SPY fails to hold 684.92 and breaks below 684.00 on the test

invalidation.condition: SPY tests 684.92 on first rally and REJECTS (closes below 684.00); VIX stabilizes or ticks back above 19.50 in first 30 min
invalidation.effect: Bull-trap confirmed: macro tailwind proved insufficient for structural breakout; flush through weak 1★ support cluster (682/681/680) becomes the primary scenario, with strategic target at Carry 675.79.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY rallies to test 684.92 resistance within the first 90 minutes of RTH (by 11:00 ET)
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY fails to touch 684.00 before 11:00 ET, remaining below 684.00 through the late morning

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains below 19.50 through 11:00 ET, sustaining the risk-on macro backdrop that anchors the bullish case
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX ticks back above 19.50 within the first 30 minutes of market open, reversing the fear-recession narrative

swarm_predictions.claim: Ribbon spread remains below 30¢ (CHOP regime) through 10:15 ET, with SPY oscillating within ±$1.00 of 682.58 during the opening 45 minutes
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon expands to 30¢+ with full bull stack (Slow < Fast < Pivot) forming before 10:15 ET

synthesis_narrative: The swarm delivers a weak bullish lean driven by macro tailwinds (VIX -8.03%, risk-on sector rotation into XLK/XLF) but the structural picture is distinctly cautious: technical sees CHOP with a 29¢ ribbon spread and price below pivot, while level thesis flags a stark bearish asymmetry with 2★ resistance at 684.92 blocking the upside and only weak 1★ supports below. The single most important thing to watch at open is the 684.92 test — a ribbon-confirmed hold above it flips the day bullish toward 686.52, but a rejection (close below 684.00) confirms the bull-trap and opens a flush through 682/681/680 toward Carry at 675.79.

technical.one_line: CHOP: ribbon MIXED 29¢ spread (sub-30¢ threshold), last 3 bars red/red/green inconsistent, price 39¢ below pivot equilibrium — no structural directional edge

macro.one_line: VIX MID regime falling -8.03% to 18.66 signals fear recession and premium compression; zero events today; XLK/XLF risk-on rotation confirms bullish backdrop despite flat overnight gap

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 684.92 (Active 2★ resistance) is $2.34 away; asymmetry bearish — strong resistance above, weak 1★ support cluster (682/681/680) below, Carry at 675.79 is the strategic flush target

internals.one_line: Classic risk-on rotation: XLK +0.61% and XLF +0.73% leading, XLE -1.48% lagging — tech and financials outperforming SPY, supports bullish directional bias

validator.top_invalidation: SPY tests 684.92 on first rally and REJECTS below 684.00 — bull trap confirmed, macro tailwind insufficient for structural breakout, weak 1★ cluster becomes a flush target
